content.problemStatement:
You are given an array AAA of NNN integers. Find the maximum value of (Aimod  (Aj+Ak))(A_i \mod (A_j + A_k))(Ai​mod(Aj​+Ak​)) over all possible triplets satisfying 1≤i,j,k≤N1 \le i, j, k \le N1≤i,j,k≤N and i,j,ki, j, ki,j,k are pairwise distinct.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of multiple lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains a single integer NNN - the size of the array.
The second line contains NNN integers - A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​.




Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line the maximum value of (Aimod  (Aj+Ak))(A_i \mod (A_j + A_k))(Ai​mod(Aj​+Ak​)).
constraints: The sum of N2N^2N2 over all test cases does not exceed 500025000^250002.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test Case 1 : We can choose the triplet (i,j,k)=(2,1,3)(i, j, k) = (2, 1, 3)(i,j,k)=(2,1,3) and we get the value of A2mod  (A1+A3)=2mod  4=2A_2 \mod (A_1 + A_3) = 2 \mod 4 = 2A2​mod(A1​+A3​)=2mod4=2.
Test Case 2 : We can choose the triplet (i,j,k)=(3,1,2)(i, j, k) = (3, 1, 2)(i,j,k)=(3,1,2) and we get the value of A3mod  (A1+A2)=3mod  4=3A_3 \mod (A_1 + A_2) = 3 \mod 4 = 3A3​mod(A1​+A2​)=3mod4=3.
